case_title: CAVALRY SPV I LLC VS. DAVID CHI et al

docket_entries.description: CLAIM OF EXEMPTION PACKET (CONFIDENTIAL)

LAW AND MOTION 302, THE COURT ADOPTED ITS TENTATIVE RULING. AS TO PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC'S HEARING ON OPPOSITION TO CLAIM OF EXEMPTION, DEFENDANT/JUDGMENT DEBTOR DAVID CHI'S CLAIM OF EXEMPTION IS GRANTED. COURT TO SIGN AND SEND OUT FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND SHERIFF'S OFFICE. JUDGE: ERNEST H. GOLDSMITH; CLERK: SEAN KANE; REPORTER: MELANIE GHENO, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)

calendar.matters:
Notice Of Hearing On Opposition To Claim Of Exemption
Off Calendar Oct-22-2015 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES: BANNIE CHOW, Certified Cantonese-language court interpreter #100364, present;
No appearances made by parties.

RULING - The Court adopted its tentative ruling. As to PLAINTIFF CAVALRY SPV I LLC'S Hearing On Opposition To Claim Of Exemption, Defendant/Judgment Debtor David Chi's Claim of Exemption is granted. COURT TO SIGN AND SEND OUT FORMAL ORDER TO PARTIES AND SHERIFF'S OFFICE. Judge: Ernest H. Goldsmith; Clerk: Sean Kane; Reporter: Melanie Gheno, CSR #7489 (302/EHG)
